overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking through the ancient Greek city of Thasos at night. The character exits a residential building, traverses a courtyard garden and city streets while following an NPC, then enters the Thasos Agora building to explore its interior halls.

events.description: moving toward and passing through doorway from interior to exterior courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through a stone doorway from interior room to exterior courtyard

entered.detail: dark fabric curtains framing the doorway on both sides
rough-hewn stone blocks with decorative border patterns
open stone doorway leading to exterior
lit torch mounted on the interior wall
polished stone tile flooring

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a stone building with rough-hewn walls and dark curtains framing a doorway. A lit torch provides warm illumination as the camera walks forward through the doorway, transitioning from the interior to an exterior courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed courtyard garden with stone walls and marble statue

events.description: turning left to view large marble statue of a satyr figure
exiting courtyard through gateway to open city street

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard garden, pausing to observe a marble statue before continuing toward the street exit

bushes and climbing plants on the courtyard walls
lit torch mounted on the exterior courtyard wall
classical marble statue of a robed figure holding grapes
opening in the wall leading to the city street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an enclosed courtyard garden surrounded by stone walls with vegetation. A large marble statue stands to the left as the camera turns to view it. The scene is lit by moonlight and a torch on the wall as the camera approaches an exit gateway leading to the city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek city street with stone buildings and torch lighting

events.description: beginning to follow NPC in dark robes through the city streets
navigating around other pedestrians while following the lead NPC

pedestrian in red dress walking past carrying a torch

ancient stone structures with tiled roofs lining the street
tall posts with lit torches illuminating the street
large public building with stone columns and steps
wide stone staircase leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a cobblestone city street at night, following an NPC in dark robes. Stone buildings with warm torchlight line the street as other pedestrians walk by. The camera approaches a large columned building entrance with wide stone steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching and entering the Thasos Agora building

events.description: ascending the stone steps to the columned entrance
passing through wooden doors into the interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone steps and entering the Thasos Agora building through large wooden doors

entered.detail: large wooden double doors at the building entrance
stone hallway with coffered ceiling leading into the building
decorative wooden lattice partition wall
wooden table covered with rolled scrolls and documents
blue fabric banner with white circular symbol hanging on wall
multi-flame oil lamp on a stand providing interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wide stone steps of the columned building entrance, passes through large wooden doors, and enters an interior corridor. Inside, the space features stone walls, a wooden lattice screen, tables with scrolls, and blue banners illuminated by oil lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior hall of Thasos Agora with scrolls and decorative elements

events.description: turning to view interior details and approaching the far doorway
approaching doorway leading back to exterior courtyard

agents.ego_description: exploring the interior rooms of the agora, examining architectural details and approaching the exit doorway

entered.detail: open doorway showing exterior courtyard with natural light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the agora interior, passing tables with scrolls and oil lamps. The wooden lattice screen shifts from left to right as the camera turns, revealing a doorway at the far end of the hall leading back outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a stone residence, through a moonlit city, and into the illuminated halls of a public agora. It begins inside a room with rough-hewn walls and dark curtains, moving forward through a doorway into an enclosed courtyard garden where a large marble statue stands under the glow of moonlight and torches. As the camera exits the gateway, the scene opens onto a cobblestone city street at night, following a robed NPC past torch-lit buildings and pedestrians toward a grand columned entrance. The camera then ascends wide stone steps and passes through large wooden doors, transitioning into an interior corridor filled with blue banners, oil lamps, and tables laden with scrolls. Finally, the view pushes deeper into the agora, passing a wooden lattice screen before turning toward a distant doorway that leads back outside.
